metadata.name: support_routing
metadata.description: Customer support emails for automated routing.

variables.email_body:
We are seeing an anomaly loosely related to 'API returning 500 Internal Server Error'. However, upon inspecting our egress proxy logs, we noticed a 502 Bad Gateway originating from your edge nodes specifically when we send a payload exceeding 2MB over a kept-alive HTTP/2 connection. Is there a known MTU issue or WAF rule dropping this?

Best,
Staff Engineer

evaluation_criteria: Must classify the intent as api_outage

variables.email_body:
Hi,

I am having an issue: Rate limit exceeded unexpectedly. Can you please help me fix this as soon as possible?

Thanks,
User_1

evaluation_criteria: Must classify the intent as api_outage

variables.email_body:
URGENT: Regarding Please add dark mode.

This is blocking our production launch. I tried clearing my cache, reviewing the documentation, and even testing on a different network, but the problem persists. We need an engineer to review our account logs immediately.

evaluation_criteria: Must classify the intent as feature_request

I am having an issue: Reset password link not working. Can you please help me fix this as soon as possible?

Thanks,
